name: Lennart
short_description: Melve NPC tied to early route context.
notes: Used in early Melve story progression.

name: Gregor
short_description: Escort/capital route NPC in early story path.
notes: Used for Melve to Vernworth route context.

name: Brant
short_description: Captain Brant gives several early Vernworth main quests.
notes: Hub for early Vernworth power base.

name: Klaus
short_description: Vernworth Vocation Guild NPC for Vocation Frustration.
notes: Unlock route NPC for Warrior/Sorcerer.

name: Roderick
short_description: Vernworth blacksmith tied to Vocation Frustration clue.
notes: Sells/represents early weapon upgrade context.

name: Ulrika
short_description: Melve NPC tied to Readvent of Calamity progression.
notes: Later romance/Harve route context.

name: Sigurd
short_description: Mystic Spearhand maister/unlock NPC.
notes: First opportunity appears around Readvent of Calamity; fallback at Dragonsbreath Tower.

name: Luz
short_description: Trickster unlock NPC at Reverent Shrine.
notes: Can unlock Trickster without full quest chain.

name: Gautstafr
short_description: Dwarf NPC for Put a Spring in Thy Step.
notes: Leads to Magick Archer unlock through Cliodhna.

name: Cliodhna
short_description: Magick Archer unlock/Maister NPC.
notes: Unlocks Magick Archer after Put a Spring in Thy Step.

name: Lamond
short_description: Warfarer unlock NPC at Volcanic Island hot springs.
notes: Requires Newt Liqueur turn-in.

name: Dragonforged
short_description: Special late-game vendor/NPC.
notes: Used for future Dragonforged/high-end gear route.

name: Glyndwr
short_description: Elven archer tied to Gift of the Bow and A Trial of Archery.
notes: Used for Portcrystal quest reward route.

name: Earland
short_description: Merchant source for Newt Liqueur in East Bakbattahl.
notes: Cross-checked with public guide sources; exact route/availability should be verified.

name: Ibrahim
short_description: Checkpoint Rest Town scrap-store merchant.
notes: Useful for Beastren Mask route before Higg's Tavern Stand.

name: Sonia
short_description: Guard who helps route the player into the castle during Disa's Plot.
notes: Act 1 castle infiltration context.

name: Sven
short_description: Regentkin and sidequest NPC for The Ornate Box.
notes: Useful optional courtly attire source.

name: Waldhar
short_description: Magistrate imprisoned in Vernworth Castle Gaol Tower.
notes: Main objective for The Caged Magistrate.

name: Kendrick
short_description: Gracious Hand NPC for The Heel of History.
notes: Speak to him to open the archive route.

name: Malcolm
short_description: Child found during The Heel of History.
notes: Guides the route to the archive/tomes.

name: Flaude
short_description: Thief Maister at the Nameless Village Old Manor.
notes: Route can claim Blades of the Pyre scroll for future Thief route.

name: Srail
short_description: Inner thief-guild NPC in Nameless Village Depths.
notes: Gives evidence and high-value Thief maister content.

name: Wilhelmina
short_description: Vernworth character tied to masquerade/castle questline.
notes: Route flags related content before Feast of Deception.

name: Allard
short_description: Noble tied to An Unsettling Encounter.
notes: Chamber search route context.

name: Dylan
short_description: Harve Village soldier context for Monster Culling.
notes: Route marker for Stormwind Cave rescue leg.
